time_boundary: 12-24 months from 2026-04-14; historical example, refresh before live use
readiness_basis: The package ties the historical thesis to primary filings, quarterly results and market context, but live actionability is blocked by stale market data and missing refreshed valuation work.
blocking_gaps: current price and valuation snapshot must be refreshed before live use
base/bull/bear valuation model was not built in this case
next quarterly results and guidance must be checked before reuse
source_scope: SEC Form 10-K, company quarterly results, public market data and selected public event-risk sources through the research cutoff date.
must_refresh_if: Apple publishes the next quarterly results or formal guidance update
core AI or product-cycle timing changes materially
tariff, supply-chain or regulatory disclosures materially affect gross margin
current price and valuation context differ materially from the April 2026 case
notes: Historical case package for Mira workflow demonstration; not investment advice.
